sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3624" key="a)kro/pteron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρό-πτερον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n3624.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quill,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.229</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀκρόπτερα φωτῶν</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flanking</tr_> men of a hunting-party, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:127" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.127</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
